entry.title: Talented Wingsuit Pilots Show Us How It’s Done

link.title: Talented Wingsuit Pilots Show Us How It’s Done

entry.content:
Piotr is an experienced wingsuit pilot, so when he saw a Red Bull sponsored crew fly alongside an airplane, he thought it looked too epic not to try. In this awesome clip, he’s matching speeds with an airplane and soaring through the sky, wing to wing!
Speaking of skilled wingsuit pilots, Jean-Michel is fulfilling our lifelong dreams of touching a cloud. After jumping out of a helicopter, he’s flying over, under and through some of the fluffiest clouds in the sky. This is bucket list material if you ask us!
entry.summary: Piotr is an experienced wingsuit pilot, so when he saw a Red Bull sponsored crew fly alongside an airplane, he thought it looked too epic not to try. In this awesome clip, he’s matching speeds with an airplane and soaring through the sky, wing to wing! Speaking of skilled wingsuit pilots, Jean-Michel is fulfilling our lifelong dreams of touching a cloud. After jumping out of a helicopter, he’s flying over, under and through some of the fluffiest clouds in the sky. This is bucket list material if you ask us!

entry.title: Time Magazine #88

link.title: Time Magazine #88

entry.content:
Olivia is a fictional pig character in a series of children’s books written and illustrated by Ian Falconer. The Olivia book series was inspired by Ian Falconer’s niece, Olivia. "I was just entranced by her," he stated. "I wanted to make a little present for her, so I started working on the Olivia book."
Ian Falconer won a lot of awards for the Olivia series. These include:
Caldecott Honor for Olivia, 2000
Parents’ Choice 2000, Gold Award Winner
Nick Jr. Books, Best Book of 2001
American Library Association, Notable Children’s Books of 2001, for Olivia.
Child’s Best Book of 2001
Los Angeles Times Best Books of 2000 & 2001
Publishers Weekly, Best Books of 2000 & 2001
American Library Association, Notable Children’s Books of 2002, for Olivia Saves the Circus.
BookSense Illustrated Children’s Book of the Year, 2002, for Olivia Saves the Circus.
Voted "Favorite Illustrator" for Olivia Helps with Christmas by 50,000 children at the Children’s Choice Book Awards, 2008
entry.summary: Olivia is a fictional pig character in a series of children’s books written and illustrated by Ian Falconer. The Olivia book series was inspired by Ian Falconer’s niece, Olivia. "I was just entranced by her," he stated. "I wanted to make a little present for her, so I started working on the Olivia book." Ian Falconer won a lot of awards for the Olivia series. These include: Caldecott Honor for Olivia, 2000 Parents’ Choice 2000, Gold Award Winner Nick Jr. Books, Best Book of 2001 American Library Association, Notable Children’s Books of 2001, for Olivia. Child’s Best Book of 2001 Los Angeles Times Best Books of 2000 & 2001 Publishers Weekly, Best Books of 2000 & 2001 American Library Association, Notable Children’s Books of 2002, for Olivia Saves the Circus. BookSense Illustrated Children’s Book of the Year, 2002, for Olivia Saves the Circus. Voted "Favorite Illustrator" for Olivia Helps with Christmas by 50,000 children at the Children’s Choice Book Awards, 2008

entry.title: A month after Sushant Singh Rajput demise, Kriti Sanon writes a cryptic post

link.title: A month after Sushant Singh Rajput demise, Kriti Sanon writes a cryptic post

entry.content: Bollywood actress Kriti Sanon shared a cryptic post for late actor Sushant Singh Rajput on Tuesday. Sushant passed away on June 14, exactly a month ago.
entry.summary: Bollywood actress Kriti Sanon shared a cryptic post for late actor Sushant Singh Rajput on Tuesday. Sushant passed away on June 14, exactly a month ago.

entry.title: Belajar Sistem Daring, Siswa Terkendala Kuota Internet

link.title: Belajar Sistem Daring, Siswa Terkendala Kuota Internet

entry.content:
BANJARMASIN, KOMPAS.TV - Proses belajar mengajar secara daring selama masa Pendemi Coronavirus Disease, Covid 19 di Kota Banjarmasin, dikeluhkan sejumlah siswa.
Seperti di SMK 2 Banjarmasin, kendati sebelumnya pihak sekolah telah melaksanakan pembelajaran daring sejak 2015 melalui Web Pribadi mereka sendiri, sehingga siswa tinggal mengisi materi dan mendownload bahan pembelajaran di Web tersebut.
Namun, sejumlah siswa mengaku sempat terkendala jaringan Internet dan Kuota dalam sistem pembelajaran daring ini, karena setiap ingin membuka materi video harus Streaming dan membutuhkan Paket Data yang banyak.
"Saya sebenarnya kangen belajar mengajar yang dilaksanakan disekolah, disatu sisi pembelajaran Daring ini menurut saya tidak terlalu efektif terlebih lagi Jaringan yang buruk dan Kouta internet" kata Ayub.
Menanggapi keluhan dari sejumlah siswa tersebut, pihak Sekolah kedepannya akan melakukan pendataan Daring dan akan membantu siswa yang terkendala hal tersebut.
"Kami pihak sekolah dan dinas pendidikan akan mendata terlebihdahulu, agar mengetahui siswa yang mana yang lebih membutuhkan" Kata Almunawar.
Menurut almunawar, dengan ini diharapkan proses belajar dan mengajar secara daring di SMK 2 di masa pandemi Covid 19 ini bisa teratasi.
entry.summary: BANJARMASIN, KOMPAS.TV - Proses belajar mengajar secara daring selama masa Pendemi Coronavirus Disease, Covid 19 di Kota Banjarmasin, dikeluhkan sejumlah siswa. Seperti di SMK 2 Banjarmasin, kendati sebelumnya pihak sekolah telah melaksanakan pembelajaran daring sejak 2015 melalui Web Pribadi mereka sendiri, sehingga siswa tinggal mengisi materi dan mendownload bahan pembelajaran di Web tersebut. Namun, sejumlah siswa mengaku sempat terkendala jaringan Internet dan Kuota dalam sistem pembelajaran daring ini, karena setiap ingin membuka materi video harus Streaming dan membutuhkan Paket Data yang banyak. "Saya sebenarnya kangen belajar mengajar yang dilaksanakan disekolah, disatu sisi pembelajaran Daring ini menurut saya tidak terlalu efektif terlebih lagi Jaringan yang buruk dan Kouta internet" kata Ayub. Menanggapi keluhan dari sejumlah siswa tersebut, pihak Sekolah kedepannya akan melakukan pendataan Daring dan akan membantu siswa yang terkendala hal tersebut. "Kami pihak sekolah dan dinas pendidikan akan mendata terlebihdahulu, agar mengetahui siswa yang mana yang lebih membutuhkan" Kata Almunawar. Menurut almunawar, dengan ini diharapkan proses belajar dan mengajar secara daring di SMK 2 di masa pandemi Covid 19 ini bisa teratasi.

entry.title: 29 Orang Positif Corona Usai Tahlilan

link.title: 29 Orang Positif Corona Usai Tahlilan

entry.content:
JAKARTA, KOMPASTV - Seorang warga di Wijaya Kusuma, Tanjung Duren, Jakarta barat dinyatakan positif terpapar virus corona.
Hal ini diketahui saat dirinya dilarikan ke IGD karena mengalami sesak napas.
Sebelumnya, dirinya diketahui tengah menghadiri acara tahlilan keluarga yang meninggal.
Hal ini dikonfirmasi oleh Lurah Wijaya Kusuma, Novi Indra Sari.
"Dari puskesmas, ada warga yang dibawa ke IGD, waktu itu mengalami sesak napas. Ternyata kemudian dilakukan swab, dan hasilnya terpapar covid", ungkap Novi saat ditanyai wartawan (22/7).
Pihak kelurahan kemudian melakukan pelacakan kasus covid-19 tersebut dengan melakukan swab test. Hasilnya, sebanyak 29 orang dinyatakan positif Covid-19. Sebanyak 20 orang kini telah dilarikan ke rumah sakit Wisma Atlet, Kemayoran. Selain itu, 3 orang lainnya dinyatakan
"Dari 94 yang melakukan test swab, ada 29 itu yang positif covid. Warga sudah ada sebagian yang diisolasi di Wisma Atlet" pungkasnya.
entry.summary: JAKARTA, KOMPASTV - Seorang warga di Wijaya Kusuma, Tanjung Duren, Jakarta barat dinyatakan positif terpapar virus corona. Hal ini diketahui saat dirinya dilarikan ke IGD karena mengalami sesak napas. Sebelumnya, dirinya diketahui tengah menghadiri acara tahlilan keluarga yang meninggal. Hal ini dikonfirmasi oleh Lurah Wijaya Kusuma, Novi Indra Sari. "Dari puskesmas, ada warga yang dibawa ke IGD, waktu itu mengalami sesak napas. Ternyata kemudian dilakukan swab, dan hasilnya terpapar covid", ungkap Novi saat ditanyai wartawan (22/7). Pihak kelurahan kemudian melakukan pelacakan kasus covid-19 tersebut dengan melakukan swab test. Hasilnya, sebanyak 29 orang dinyatakan positif Covid-19. Sebanyak 20 orang kini telah dilarikan ke rumah sakit Wisma Atlet, Kemayoran. Selain itu, 3 orang lainnya dinyatakan "Dari 94 yang melakukan test swab, ada 29 itu yang positif covid. Warga sudah ada sebagian yang diisolasi di Wisma Atlet" pungkasnya.

entry.title: Rahul Condemns ‘Injustice’ As Bjp Ruled States Top The Charts In Crime Against Sc Sts

link.title: Rahul Condemns ‘Injustice’ As Bjp Ruled States Top The Charts In Crime Against Sc Sts

entry.content:
The brutality shown by MP police is deeply shocking and reeks of the mentality that BJP & its leaders represent. The Guna incident where a poor farmer and his family were brutally beaten by the police has once again raised the issue of atrocities against SC/STs in BJP ruled states.
Rahul Gandhi has condemned the attack and said, "Our fight is against this mindset and injustice".
#GunaIncident #BJP #ST #SC #RahulGandhi #Congress #Dalit #NCRB
entry.summary: The brutality shown by MP police is deeply shocking and reeks of the mentality that BJP & its leaders represent. The Guna incident where a poor farmer and his family were brutally beaten by the police has once again raised the issue of atrocities against SC/STs in BJP ruled states. Rahul Gandhi has condemned the attack and said, "Our fight is against this mindset and injustice". #GunaIncident #BJP #ST #SC #RahulGandhi #Congress #Dalit #NCRB

link.title: Saif Ali Khan outside his house in Bandra

entry.content: Actor Saif Ali Khan was recently snapped outside his house in Bandra. The actor was seen dressed in white kurta pyjama.
entry.summary: Actor Saif Ali Khan was recently snapped outside his house in Bandra. The actor was seen dressed in white kurta pyjama.

entry.title: Alex Trebek Reveals Surprise Via Twitter Update

link.title: Alex Trebek Reveals Surprise Via Twitter Update

entry.content:
The legendary game show host Alex Trebek was diagnosed with pancreatic cancer months ago.
However, CNN reports he continues to beat his odds.
The beloved host of "Jeopardy!" provided fans with an update on both his health and the show recently.
"I’m doing well," Trebek said in a video posted to the show’s official Twitter account.
"I’ve been continuing my treatment and it is paying off though it does fatigue me a great deal. I wrote a book that will be coming out July 21st!"
His memoir will be released the day before his 80th birthday.
entry.summary: The legendary game show host Alex Trebek was diagnosed with pancreatic cancer months ago. However, CNN reports he continues to beat his odds. The beloved host of "Jeopardy!" provided fans with an update on both his health and the show recently. "I’m doing well," Trebek said in a video posted to the show’s official Twitter account. "I’ve been continuing my treatment and it is paying off though it does fatigue me a great deal. I wrote a book that will be coming out July 21st!" His memoir will be released the day before his 80th birthday.

entry.title: Kulbhushan Jadhav ‘visibly stressed’, Pakistan ‘records’ conversation Oneindia News

link.title: Kulbhushan Jadhav ‘visibly stressed’, Pakistan ‘records’ conversation Oneindia News

entry.content:
Indian consular officials were allowed to meet Kulbhushan Jadhav but were not granted unimpeded access to the Indian national who is sentenced to death in Pakistan over charges of espionage. This was the second time that access was given, the first was in September 2019 several weeks after the ICJ stayed Jadhav’s death sentence and asked Pakistan to provide him consular access.
#JusticeForJadhav #ICJ #KulbhushanJadhav
entry.summary: Indian consular officials were allowed to meet Kulbhushan Jadhav but were not granted unimpeded access to the Indian national who is sentenced to death in Pakistan over charges of espionage. This was the second time that access was given, the first was in September 2019 several weeks after the ICJ stayed Jadhav’s death sentence and asked Pakistan to provide him consular access. #JusticeForJadhav #ICJ #KulbhushanJadhav

entry.title: Le résumé en vidéo de la 6e et dernière étape - Cyclisme - Tour de France virtuel

link.title: Le résumé en vidéo de la 6e et dernière étape - Cyclisme - Tour de France virtuel

entry.content: VIDÉO TOUR DE FRANCE VIRTUEL - Ce dimanche se disputait la dernière étape de ce Tour de France virtuel. Chez les hommes, elle a été remportée par l’Australien William Clarke (Trek-Segafredo). Au classement général, l’équipe NTT Pro Cycling termine en tête. Côté féminin, l’Américaine Lauren Stephens (Tibco-SBV) s’est adjugée cette sixième étape, le classement général revenant son équipe, Tibco-SBV. Découvrez le résumé de la sixième et dernière étape en vidéo.
entry.summary: VIDÉO TOUR DE FRANCE VIRTUEL - Ce dimanche se disputait la dernière étape de ce Tour de France virtuel. Chez les hommes, elle a été remportée par l’Australien William Clarke (Trek-Segafredo). Au classement général, l’équipe NTT Pro Cycling termine en tête. Côté féminin, l’Américaine Lauren Stephens (Tibco-SBV) s’est adjugée cette sixième étape, le classement général revenant son équipe, Tibco-SBV. Découvrez le résumé de la sixième et dernière étape en vidéo.

entry.title: ✅ Eric Dupond-Moretti : cette raison pour laquelle il a finalement accepté d’être ministre de la Ju

link.title: ✅ Eric Dupond-Moretti : cette raison pour laquelle il a finalement accepté d’être ministre de la Ju

entry.content:
Please Visit:
Please Subscribe:
✍  Eric Dupond-Moretti divise et embrase les passions. Aujourd’hui ministre de la Justice, la star du barreau est bien résolue à mener à bien ses nouvelles responsabilités politiques. Qui ne lui semblaient pourtant pas aussi évidentes il y a encore quelques temps… Eric Dupond-Moretti +suivre +suivre -ne plus suivre  Le 6 juillet dernier, après la démission d’Edouard Philippe, Jean Castex, nouveau Premier ministre, prenait place dans l’hôtel Matignon pour y opérer un remaniement ministériel très attendu. Et l’issue de cette fameuse journée du 6 juillet n’a cessé de faire parler. D’abord sur un plan purement politique, avec des nominations inattendues, comme celle de Roselyne Bachelot à la Culture. Mais pas que. Si le cas Gérald Darmanin, désormais ministre de l’Intérieur, a soulevé une vague d’indignation au sein de l’opinion publique - le premier flic de France étant visé par des accusations de viol - celui d’Eric Dupond-Moretti a tout autant déchaîné les passions. Il faut dire …
entry.summary: Please Visit: Please Subscribe: ✍ Eric Dupond-Moretti divise et embrase les passions. Aujourd’hui ministre de la Justice, la star du barreau est bien résolue à mener à bien ses nouvelles responsabilités politiques. Qui ne lui semblaient pourtant pas aussi évidentes il y a encore quelques temps… Eric Dupond-Moretti +suivre +suivre -ne plus suivre Le 6 juillet dernier, après la démission d’Edouard Philippe, Jean Castex, nouveau Premier ministre, prenait place dans l’hôtel Matignon pour y opérer un remaniement ministériel très attendu. Et l’issue de cette fameuse journée du 6 juillet n’a cessé de faire parler. D’abord sur un plan purement politique, avec des nominations inattendues, comme celle de Roselyne Bachelot à la Culture. Mais pas que. Si le cas Gérald Darmanin, désormais ministre de l’Intérieur, a soulevé une vague d’indignation au sein de l’opinion publique - le premier flic de France étant visé par des accusations de viol - celui d’Eric Dupond-Moretti a tout autant déchaîné les passions. Il faut dire …

entry.title: pothys and ramachandra textile’s license cancelled Oneindia Malayalam

link.title: pothys and ramachandra textile’s license cancelled Oneindia Malayalam

entry.content:
pothys and ramachandra textile’s license cancelled
മേയര്‍ കെ ശ്രീകുമാറാണ് നടപടിയെടുത്തതായി അറിയിച്ചത്.നഗരസഭാ സ്ഥാപനങ്ങള്‍ പൂട്ടി സീല്‍ ചെയ്തു. നഗരസഭാ നല്‍കിയ മുന്നറിയിപ്പ്പുകള്‍ സ്വീകരിക്കാന്‍ രണ്ടു സ്ഥാപനങ്ങളും തയ്യാറായില്ല എന്നതാണ് നടപടിക്ക് കാരണം.
entry.summary: pothys and ramachandra textile’s license cancelled മേയര്‍ കെ ശ്രീകുമാറാണ് നടപടിയെടുത്തതായി അറിയിച്ചത്.നഗരസഭാ സ്ഥാപനങ്ങള്‍ പൂട്ടി സീല്‍ ചെയ്തു. നഗരസഭാ നല്‍കിയ മുന്നറിയിപ്പ്പുകള്‍ സ്വീകരിക്കാന്‍ രണ്ടു സ്ഥാപനങ്ങളും തയ്യാറായില്ല എന്നതാണ് നടപടിക്ക് കാരണം.

entry.title: Bitcoin Scam: क्या होती है क्रिप्टोकरेंसी Bitcoin, जिसकी मांग कर रहा था हैकर वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Bitcoin Scam: क्या होती है क्रिप्टोकरेंसी Bitcoin, जिसकी मांग कर रहा था हैकर वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
The micro-blogging site was very disturbing for Twitter on Wednesday night. Twitter accounts of many world veterans including Barack Obama, Bill Gates were hacked, after which Twitter closed all blue tick accounts for several hours. After hacking the account, money was being sought in the form of bitcoins by tweeting from all the accounts .. currently this difficulty has been overcome… so let’s know what is bitcoin and why it remains in the discussion
माइक्रो ब्लॉगिंग साइट ट्विटर के लिए बुधवार की रात काफी परेशान करने वाली रही. बराक ओबामा, बिल गेट्स समेत दुनिया के कई दिग्गजों के ट्विटर अकाउंट को हैक कर लिया गया, जिसके बाद कई घंटों तक ट्विटर ने ब्लू टिक वाले सभी अकाउंट को बंद कर दिया. अकाउंट हैक करने के बाद सभी अकाउंट्स से ट्वीट कर बिटकॉइन के रूप में पैसा मांगा जा रहा था..फिलहाल इस मुश्किल को दूर कर लिया गया है… तो आइए जानते हैं कि आखिर क्या है बिटकॉइन और ये क्यों चर्चा में रहता है
#Twitter #BarackObama #BillGates #Bitcoin
entry.summary: The micro-blogging site was very disturbing for Twitter on Wednesday night. Twitter accounts of many world veterans including Barack Obama, Bill Gates were hacked, after which Twitter closed all blue tick accounts for several hours. After hacking the account, money was being sought in the form of bitcoins by tweeting from all the accounts .. currently this difficulty has been overcome… so let’s know what is bitcoin and why it remains in the discussion माइक्रो ब्लॉगिंग साइट ट्विटर के लिए बुधवार की रात काफी परेशान करने वाली रही. बराक ओबामा, बिल गेट्स समेत दुनिया के कई दिग्गजों के ट्विटर अकाउंट को हैक कर लिया गया, जिसके बाद कई घंटों तक ट्विटर ने ब्लू टिक वाले सभी अकाउंट को बंद कर दिया. अकाउंट हैक करने के बाद सभी अकाउंट्स से ट्वीट कर बिटकॉइन के रूप में पैसा मांगा जा रहा था..फिलहाल इस मुश्किल को दूर कर लिया गया है… तो आइए जानते हैं कि आखिर क्या है बिटकॉइन और ये क्यों चर्चा में रहता है #Twitter #BarackObama #BillGates #Bitcoin
